description_long: This is a rugged, off-road style SUV with a matte black exterior and bold red accents on the hood and roof. The vehicle features oversized, all-terrain tires with deep treads and blue highlights on the rims, as well as prominent fender flares for added protection. The front end is equipped with a reinforced bumper, a roof-mounted light bar, and additional spotlights above the grille, while the rear carries several red fuel canisters and a mesh cargo rack. The side profile reveals a roof rack, side mirrors, and a visible step for easier entry, with the doors slightly ajar. The windows are tinted, and the rear cargo area is partially enclosed with mesh and metal framework. The SUV's design suggests it is built for durability and utility, suitable for urban or off-road environments.
description: A matte black, off-road SUV with red accents, oversized tires, roof racks, and rugged utility features. It has visible spotlights, mesh cargo areas, and a robust, adventure-ready design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, roof-mounted light bar, red hood stripes, and large tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open door, step, roof rack, mesh cargo area, and blue-accented wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays red fuel canisters, mesh cargo rack, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open door, step, and utility racks.
attribute_wheel_design: Large black rims with blue highlights and deep-treaded off-road tires
